required_preferences.fact: Spends Sunday nights having dinner and in-person conversation with girlfriend's parents during their visit — personal time moved to later evenings after guests retire

supersedes.fact: Uses Sunday nights for personal relaxation or calls with girlfriend, no in-person plans during her assignment — does not prioritize date night activities

required_preferences.fact: Meets sister weekly for engagement party planning sessions, often at her apartment or event venue — restaurant lunches are no longer regular or prioritized

supersedes.fact: Meets sister for lunch once a month at a different local restaurant every time — never repeats the same spot twice in a row

required_preferences.fact: Explores new Dallas coffee shops monthly — never goes to national chains on weekends
Completes a 10-minute evening prep routine to wind down for sleep, including setting out clothes and prepping breakfast for the next morning
Prepares more elaborate home-cooked meals and shifts dinners to the dining table for two weeks to accommodate girlfriend's parents' stay, prioritizing family-style presentation over quick solo meals
Tracks daily pain levels and recovery progress using a plantar fasciitis app every evening before bed during rehabilitation period

persona: A 28-year-old customer support manager at a multinational e-commerce company
